scripts.test:journey: ENABLE_V2_JOURNEY=1 npx playwright test --config playwright.config.ts playwright/journey.spec.ts
scripts.test:journey:desktop: ENABLE_V2_JOURNEY=1 npx playwright test --config playwright.config.ts playwright/journey.spec.ts --project=desktop
scripts.test:journey:mobile: ENABLE_V2_JOURNEY=1 npx playwright test --config playwright.config.ts playwright/journey.spec.ts --project=mobile
